name: anchor-coach
description: The Anchor curriculum — an 8-milestone interactive first-project course. Teaches an absolute beginner to build, test, and ship a working web app by directing an AI agent. ~2 hours of session time. Auto-activates in any folder containing a .project-manager/ directory; before that, trigger phrases include 'start the Anchor curriculum', 'my first app', and 'I'm learning to code'.
